texto: Seeing God is all about getting in touch with reality. If you want to photograph God, focus your lens on Hamakom, The Place, anyplace where you see divine light illuminating reality. Let your camera collect the light reflecting from the reality shaping your everyday life and you will find yourself photographing God in action." (From the Introduction to the book Photograph God)
explicacao: Citação de Mel Alexenberg sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Seeing God is all about getting in touch with reality.
